afterSnapshot.name: testRoutePlanStartTimeShift

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Directly prove the route honors the timeline-selected departure time: the same route posted 6h apart must shift its ETA/depart times by 6h and re-resolve per-leg weather to the shifted arrival.
implementation: POST the identical Mediterranean route twice with startTimes 6h apart; assert geometry is unchanged, departTimeMs/etaMs shift by exactly 6h, and the leg's resolved conditions.time moves to a later forecast hour — proving backend re-resolution against the shifted arrival.
